programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Telltale Talk Show Host
programme.desc: Dr Sheila Carlin is good friends with Della who calls Perry in when she is being pestered by someone On the theory that it could be somebody that she works with at a radio stations she arranges Perry to be interviewed by Winslow Keene who is also the stations owner Winslow enrages the rest of the talk show hosts on the station by informing them of changes that he is making to their time slots That night Winslow is shot by a hit man hired by someone at the station and Sheila is set up for the murder She calls in Perry and as usual Perry Della and Ken swing into action to find out who really did it

programme.title: TBH 107
programme.desc: TBH 107

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S05E01
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S05E01

programme.title: Munsters 134
programme.desc: Munsters 134

programme.title: Addams Family 117
programme.desc: Addams Family 117

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: April Lopez returns as a lounge singer Bud and Margarets kids disrupt their parents second honeymoon with constant needs World War 2 veteran Frank and USO entertainer Eve reunite after thirty-five years

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph a doctor keeps dominating peoples lives He frees a robber Rune from getting hanged; and forces his charge on him too as compensation Things change when Elizabeth enters Josephs life

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate takes over Sams newspaper column called Dear Minerva to give anonymous advice

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe tricks Kate to take his place on serving as a jury But when he discovers he has won the raffle and the ticket is in Kates suitcase he rushes to Pixley to retrieve it

programme.title: TBH 104
programme.desc: TBH 104

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A jittery airline heir Brett Cullen finds himself on a flight to hell Meanwhile a stewardess Lezlie Deane goes home with a charming passenger Ted Demers who may be too good to be true

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bum displays his ability to resurrect himself

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hooker learns that beauty is only skin deep

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Eager and unscrupulous tabloid newspaper reporter Jane L will go to any length to score a juicy scoop Jane L gets in way over her head when she goes snooping around a remote rural mansion in search of Billy Baltimore a legendary 60s acid rock guitarist who reportedly died twenty years ago

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: International hit woman Jackie Dresser makes a living traveling all over the world and bumping people off for a substantial fee Complications arise when the lonely and love-starved Jackie falls for hunky fitness instructor Johnnie while on vacation in a foreign country

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When Nick Knight goes to investigate the alleged suicide of a space scientist he discovers that an asteroid is heading for Earth and is projected to strike within 3 months

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: The spirit of a dead voodoo priestess strikes out at three voodoo Legbas to get their power and resurrect herself and take revenge on the fourth Legba who killed her

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While trying to impress a pretty Nurse Parker receives several serious blows to his morale and humiliated he puts in for a transfer Then complications arise when McHale The Crew and the Nurse work up a plan to try to help him to regain his self-esteem and change his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A lost crate containing a top-secret clay that can be converted to explosives washes up on the island Not knowing what it is they make several items with it--including Gilligans new tooth fillings

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpas determination to keep Hassies 15th birthday party a surprise causes her to become genuinely hurt and angry when she becomes convinced that no one cares about the occasion

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa defies the city road commissioner when he decides to take matters into his own hands by fixing a pesky hole in the road in front of his house

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After Max hides some secret plans he has to go into a jail to retrieve them

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The deadliest of the species A woman pretends to love Max so she can kill him

programme.title: BJ and the Bear S03E06
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear S03E06

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogans set-up at Stalag 13

programme.title: Hogans 319
programme.desc: Hogans 319

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton finds out that Parker is an old friend of a famous War Correspondent he makes Parker the Base PR Officer in the hope of becoming the subject of the Correspondents next story But Parkers plan to improve The Captains image backfires

programme.title: Attack Force Nam
programme.desc: A group of Australian commandos launch a secret mission against Japanese forces in World War II

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Penny and Talon compete to solve the mystery of the Sphinx while Gadget is stuck with a riddle of his own

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget is on the hunt for signs of Dr Claws latest medical experiment but Penny finds it first

programme.title: The Hitman
programme.desc: A Cop goes undercover as a Hitman to bring down a criminal organization

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Merrill expects a prestigious award but the presenter is not whom he expects Adam is attached to elderly George and Gloria Hancock from his hometown Recently divorced Dan Holt runs into his ex-wifes lawyer Ann Sterling

programme.title: WKRP 105

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The FBI approaches Uncle Jesse to allow Boss to stay at the Duke farm since he is a key witness in an upcoming trial for one of the Souths most notorious racketeers The reason is because the mob boss has placed a huge bounty on Boss head and has hitmen all over Hazzard County who will stop at nothing to prevent him from testifying While Boss is in hiding Rosco takes over his little fat buddys administrative duties relishing the absolute authority that comes with the job

programme.title: Hercules 216
programme.desc: Hercules 216

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili is given a psychotropic drug called bliss via a Taelon device They discover it is widespread With an instantly strong addictive property the addicts are dying within 48 hours The investigation leads Liam and Sandoval to Ireland

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: To escape capture an alien merges with a pregnant woman This causes unexpected consequences for the aliens and for Blackwoods team - and violence for the hospital staff when the womanalien goes into labor

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcanes mentor Dr Oliver Duncan is mysteriously killed everyone assumes Arcane is to blame Unfazed Arcane attempts to steal Duncans cold fusion research by romancing his daughter Louise who has plans of her own

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes genius is about to be publicly lauded in an autobiographical film But the actor playing him is found murdered in Arcanes trailer Who was the murderer - and was Arcane the intended victim

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Contact is made with the planet Piri where the main computer created an idyllic life that led to extinction of its population through apathy Now John Koenig must fight to save Alpha as his people fall under the same fate

programme.title: Highlander
programme.desc: An immortal Scottish swordsman must confront the last of his immortal opponents a murderously brutal barbarian who lusts for the fabled Prize

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The Barkleys prepare for the unveiling of a statue dedicated to family patriarch Tom prompting Victoria to visit Heaths birthplace and learn about Toms secret past

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: When Cheyenne is hired as foreman at a ranch in a range war he doesnt realize part of his job is to marry the boss daughter She turns down all the men her father introduces her to as she loves a Mexican but he hates Mexicans

programme.title: Young 318
programme.desc: Young 318

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Domestic dissension helps the police in their pursuit of a family of con artists; guests Michael Ansara Philip Ahn

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMFs target is Poltroni an international drug dealer Poltroni alias Ted Carson is in a country with no extradition treaty with the United States Briggs devises a plan to lure Poltroni to a neighboring country where he can be arrested and sent to the US To execute the scheme Barney will have to fight for his life against one of Poltronis thugs while Cinammon will be bait for Poltroni Also getting Poltroni to the border wont be easy Its about 100 miles away

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: An immigrant cigar makers son is accosted by neighborhood bullies and calls the police to put a stop to the harassment The only witness to the incident is Dr Kimble whose face seems oddly familiar to the officers

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A handsome stranger saves Audras life during a horse stampede and she quickly becomes attached to him unaware of his involvement in a series of robberies in the Valley

programme.title: What to See and Do
programme.desc: Amazing Tour of 30A Florida from Topsail to 30Avenue With Conley Norris EO Wilson Biophilia Center Freeport Chris Alvarado BeachBilly Lifestyle checking out t"

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: Captain Newman MD
programme.desc: In 1944 an Army doctor is in charge of a neuropsychiatric ward at an Army Air Corps hospital in Arizona and he must deal with a variety of tough cases

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Away All Boats
programme.desc: The story of a US Naval ship and its crew in the Pacific from 1943 to 1945

programme.desc: A cheerleader Betsy Russell her boyfriend Leif Garrett colleagues and a team mascot Lucinda Dickey attend a competition spoiled by murder

programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The last Guardians escape to Earth after the fall of Gobotron while Cy-Kill and Master Renegade begin planning the attack on Earth

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Last Engineer devises a plan - and a set of Power Suits - which could defeat the Renegades

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: A tussle with a comet hurls the Pride and crew twenty-five years back in time to Jayces home planet They search and find Audric when he was a student Jayce tells him he is his son and after much hesitation Audric almost believes him

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss and Monster Minds are blocking sunlight to a planet making it too cold for that planets defensive humruns large bugs to be capable of fighting and eating the Monster Mind vines Jayce and Oon are imprisoned by the native people

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is firing all the cannonballs on Captain Kidds island to retrieve the gold hidden inside of them Their activity draws the attention of MASK

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An explorer discovers an ancient Mayan City where giant stones become weightless under the full moonlight He sells this information to Miles Mayhem while Matt Trakker mounts his own excursion to the same location

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Evil The Resurrected Devil

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The updated adventures of a bumbling detective
